name: mobius
description: Local-only Mobius v1 with typed state, guarded evidence review, and explicit main-Agent composition.

interface.longDescription: Mobius is an opt-in, local-only Objective workflow with immutable Trail facts, complete evidence review, and one guarded completion path. Source stays unavailable because it contains no binary; only a gated assembled target is installable.
defaultPrompt: Establish an explicitly targeted Mobius Objective with Mobius Copilot.
Run an explicitly targeted Mobius Objective.
